themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "The fifth, Shephatiah of Abital: the sixth, Ithream by Eglah his wife —these were David's son...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".

4: he reigned there seven years and six months

evidenceTrail.detail: לַֽאֲבִיטָ֑ל: of Abital - abital, a wife of king david
